commentaries.author: Clement Of Rome
commentaries.content: For it is indeed a great and admirable thing to establish, not the things which are standing, but these that are falling. Thus also did Christ desire

commentaries.author: Ignatius of Antioch
commentaries.content: But may those that dishonoured them be forgiven through the grace of Jesus Christ, "who wisheth not the death of the sinner, but his repentance."
